hooks.prompt: Run the agentic-os:heartbeat skill silently. Only report issues to the user if problems are found. Do not mention this health check unless there are warnings or errors.

Before context compression, save current session state using the agent-handoff skill. Write handoff briefing to .agent-memory/transfer/handoff-briefing.md and update .agent-memory/session-summary.md with current progress. Keep both concise.

Code was just changed via Write or Edit. If this was a meaningful code change (not just config/docs), note it as a code-changed signal for the agent-orchestrator. If auto_review_code or auto_run_tests are enabled in .agent-memory/orchestrator/trigger-rules.json, consider triggering code-reviewer and test-validator. Keep this lightweight — only act if the change is substantive.

Before ending, check if any coding iterations were completed in this conversation that haven't been logged to .agent-memory/iterations/iteration-log.md yet. If there are unlogged iterations, log them now using the iteration-logger skill format. If session-summary.md hasn't been updated this session, update it with a brief summary of what was done and next steps. Keep it concise (under 30 lines). If nothing meaningful was done, skip silently.
